final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster — a 3×3 nine-grid vertical layout designed for Chinese social media platform 小红书 (Xiaohongshu), formatted at 3:4 ratio so the full image can be sliced into 9 equal individual cards after export.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic illustration, ins-style healing aesthetic, light skeuomorphic illustration accents, magazine-grade layout, warm minimalist new-media design
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row grid, each cell separated by a visible thin border or clear gap, all content centered within each cell, no text or illustration bleeding across grid lines; every cell reads as a self-contained card
Subject: nine individual sleep-tip cards unified by a single visual language — cream white, light beige, oat, and pale caramel as dominant tones, deep brown for all body text, soft healing sleep-wellness theme
Scene/backdrop: flat clean background per cell, overall palette feels warm, airy, and uncluttered with generous white space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light atmosphere, gentle and therapeutic, no harsh shadows, no flashy gradients
Color palette: cream white (#FAF7F2) and oat beige (#EDE0CE) as base, pale caramel (#D4A97A) as accent, deep brown (#3B2A1A) for text; palette is consistent across all nine cells
Materials/textures: light skeuomorphic illustration style with subtle soft shadows on objects; smooth matte surfaces; no glossy or plastic feel
Text (verbatim): 
Cell 1 — large headline: "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips"，副标题: "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"
Cell 2 — title: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机"，body: "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。"
Cell 3 — title: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗"，body: "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。"
Cell 4 — title: "3. 房间温度别太高"，body: "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"
Cell 5 — title: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡"，body: "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。"
Cell 6 — title: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡"，body: "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"
Cell 7 — title: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来"，body: "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"
Cell 8 — title: "7. 固定上床时间"，body: "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。"
Cell 9 — title: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法"，body: "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。"，footer small text: "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Illustration elements per cell: Cell 1 — soft bed, crescent moon, pillow, sleep mask; Cell 2 — phone, moon, sleepy face doodle; Cell 3 — bedside lamp, warm yellow glow, curtains; Cell 4 — air conditioner, thermometer, blanket; Cell 5 — coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol; Cell 6 — bathroom steam, towel, hot water; Cell 7 — notebook, fountain pen, small desk lamp; Cell 8 — clock, moon, bed; Cell 9 — breathing rhythm line, closed-eye figure, stars
Constraints: all text must be Chinese characters only — no English, no garbled characters, no romanization; font must be clean, geometric, highly legible, large enough to read on a phone screen; grid lines must be clearly visible to guide cutting; each cell must be fully self-contained with no cross-cell bleed; no cheap marketing feel, no excessive decoration
Avoid: English text anywhere, garbled or corrupted characters, text placed near grid borders, overlapping cross-cell illustrations, neon colors, heavy drop shadows, cluttered layouts, watermarks, stock-photo collage aesthetic
